title: Legacy backlog batch 1 dispositioned
body: Closed claim 62c03131 after processing the first 5 entries in the 2026-05-06-to-2026-05-21 legacy backlog in place. Dispositions: 2 duplicate, 2 owner-gated, 1 stale-withdrawn. Verification: markdownlint targeted pass, git diff --check pass, practice:fitness:strict-hard remains SOFT with 20 soft, 22 healthy, 8 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0.
